description: Single source of truth for the session-scoped (throwaway) volume roles. bin/lib/ephemeral.bash names this session's volumes vol-<id>-<role> (session_volume_name) and removes them on teardown; the compose file declares the matching named volumes. Shared caches keyed outside the session id (e.g. a package store or a per-workspace node_modules cache) are deliberately NOT listed here, so they survive an ephemeral teardown and are reclaimed by the volume GC instead of this session reaper.
